verdict: Conditional Go — functional core is solid; 1 security blocker + 1 missing subscription-expiry job must be fixed before public launch.

scoring.method: weighted average of per-module readiness scores

modules.name: Coupons
missing: No minimum-order-amount or category/plan scoping on coupons
database: Coupon, CouponRedemption well-indexed; unique manualPaymentSubmissionId enforces 1 redemption per submission
security: validate route: auth + email-verified + rate limited; admin CRUD gated by requireMinRole('admin'); audit logged
notes: Robust validation: per-user + global limits, pending-use accounting prevents over-redemption, expiry, zero-final-amount guard
Redemption is atomic + idempotent inside approval transaction
Minor: usedCount check+increment not row-locked (SQLite serializes writes, low risk)

modules.name: Pricing
broken: POST with duplicate slug throws raw UNIQUE constraint => 500 instead of 409 (no pre-check, no try/catch)
missing: No range validation (negative/zero durationDays, price not bounded)
No audit logging on plan create/update/delete (inconsistent with Coupons)
database: PricingPlan indexed on (isActive, sortOrder); raw SQL uses parameterized tagged templates (injection-safe)
DELETE is hard delete (no soft-delete / historical retention)
security: Admin routes gated by requireMinRole('admin'); public GET exposes active plans only
notes: Plans are display/label-only; not FK-referenced by Payment, so hard delete causes no orphan integrity error

modules.name: Payments
missing: No real payment gateway integration — /api/payments only creates 'pending' records with no webhook/signature verification (stub)
Manual UPI is the only functional payment path
VirusScanResult model exists but is not wired to screenshot uploads
database: ManualPaymentSubmission: unique utrNumber prevents duplicate proofs; Payment + PaymentAuditLog indexed
Float used for money (acceptable on SQLite; migrate to Decimal on Postgres)
security: BLOCKER: payment-proof screenshots are publicly downloadable. /api/upload/file has no auth requirement and canAccessListingImageFile() returns true for any key not starting with 'listings/' (screenshots/ included). UTR/transaction proofs leak via guessable key.
Manual submit: auth + verified + rate limited + MIME sniffing; admin approve atomic + audit + notification
notes: Screenshots written to local disk uploads/screenshots — ephemeral on standalone/serverless, not durable, no CDN
Coupon amount-match re-validated server-side on submit and QR generation (good — prevents discount tampering)
Amount-match logic duplicated across payments, payments/manual, qr routes

modules.name: Subscriptions (Premium)
broken: CRITICAL: premium never expires. premiumExpiry is set (+30d) on approval but NO cron/job/read-time check ever resets isPremium=false. refresh-ranking cron expires only listing boost/featured, not user premium.
missing: No renewal reminders or grace period
No dedicated Subscription model (premium = User.isPremium + premiumExpiry one-time flag)
database: User.isPremium / premiumExpiry indexed (isPremium, premiumExpiry) — index exists but is never used to expire
security: Premium status flows through JWT with 2-min cache + sessionVersion invalidation
notes: Effectively a permanent one-time perk, not a subscription. Revenue leakage: users keep premium forever after a single payment.

modules.name: Reports
missing: Legacy Report model still in schema (deprecated, unused dead weight)
database: ListingReport @@unique(listingId,userId) prevents duplicate reports; well-indexed by resolution + recency
security: Submit: auth required, self-report blocked, P2002 -> 409; resolve gated by admin, atomic, audit logged, suspends bump sessionVersion
notes: moderatorNotes read/written via raw SQL ($executeRaw / parameterized $queryRawUnsafe) — works but hints at prisma-client/schema drift

modules.name: Search & Filters
broken: keyword + category combined: the category branch overwrites where.OR, dropping the keyword filter (keyword ignored when a category is also selected)
missing: No full-text index (uses SQLite LIKE 'contains') — slow at scale; no fuzzy/typo tolerance
database: Listing has extensive composite indexes for status/priority/geo/category filters
security: Public GET rate-limited per IP; userId queries require matching authenticated session (no enumeration)
notes: 'ranking' sort re-sorts in-memory per page only — global ordering relies on stored priorityScore; minor pagination inconsistency

modules.name: Production Build
notes: next build: exit 0, 1554 static pages generated, standalone asset copy now cross-platform (bun scripts/copy-standalone-assets.mjs)
Warning: metadataBase not set -> OG/Twitter images resolve to http://localhost:3000 (SEO/social cosmetic)

launchBlockers: Payment-proof screenshots publicly accessible (broken access control on /api/upload/file for screenshots/ keys)
Premium subscriptions never expire (no downgrade job) — revenue leakage
highPriority: No real payment gateway / webhook verification (manual UPI only)
Search ignores keyword when combined with category filter
Local-disk screenshot storage not durable for standalone/serverless deploy
mediumPriority: Pricing admin: add slug uniqueness pre-check, range validation, audit logging, error handling
Migrate money fields Float -> Decimal on Postgres
Set metadataBase for correct OG image URLs
